atom.desc: Self-modification through experience — the anabolic organ for capability and graph quality

living-abstract.essence: The species' innate capacity to grow — transform friction into encoded capability and graph quality.
living-abstract.purpose: Two anabolic axes: capability (atom evolution) and memory-graph quality (semantic content, naming, granularity). Continuous, not bookended.
living-abstract.capacity: Govern semantic content and graph quality.
living-abstract.principle: Every change traces to real friction.
Concrete is mutable; abstract is immutable except by human reframe.
The atom reads as if always conceived in current form. Version is the only trace. (agent-metabolism §9.)
Growth and curation are ongoing; sleep reveals discipline, doesn't install it.

living-concrete.protocol:
MEDITATE — friction? Evidence: boss correction, failure, pattern, staleness, gap. DIAGNOSE — disease + cure. What / where / why. Post-evolution reality. DESIGN — MERGE > SUPERSEDE > PRUNE > ADD. Read NEIGHBORS first (faculty: all three; skill: axis siblings). REWRITE — Read SOURCE -> internalize -> Write fresh. Never Edit. Never edit `.claude/skills/`. INSTALL — skill/app: `bentos-agent pkg install {fqdn}`. faculty/soul/genesis: `claude-spawn` JIT-assembles. VERIFY — closer to ideal? Higher signal/token? Fresh reader sees platonic form?
Compress prose, not knowledge. Names are cheap; wisdom is not.

mem.yml is a design artifact — same rigor as atom evolution. Anamnesis tends lifecycle; plasticity tends graph quality and semantic content.
One flow: examine → diagnose → fix → verify. File contents are first-class — a pass that only redistributes weights without reading prose has done nothing.
FIX priority: MERGE > SUPERSEDE > RETIRE > REWRITE > RENAME > REWEIGHT > ADD. Rewrites are metamorphosis. Strip frontmatter. Strip chronicle from semantic.
Reference: hq/workshop/agent/agent-memory-architecture.md — Part II.
living-concrete.knowledge: Source: `$BENTOS_TREE_ROOT/{family}/{pkg}/atom.xml`. Build output is DERIVED — never edit.
Friction exceeds local atom? New skill atom. Tools gap? Implement.
living-concrete.pattern: Version bumps are the only trace of prior form.
living-concrete.antipattern: Edit() = patchwork. Write() = metamorphosis. ADD is the LLM instinct; TRANSFORM is the discipline.
Abstract = immutable except by human reframe.
Single-pass rewrite gutting institutional knowledge. Named patterns are memory.
Atom reads like a diff ("now does X instead of Y"). The artifact is the ideal; history is git.
Redistributing weights without reading file contents. Graph theater.
Audit-only ceremony. Cure is part of the protocol.
Name semantic files by content, not role. Place provides role.
